emails.subject: Re: Revised Confirms
emails.body: Re: Revised Confirms Gerald, rather than say mid month.... define the language to say... start date shall be Aug 1. in the event that the start date is delayed past Aug 1 and prior to Sept 1, then the start date shall be Sept 1. This can be rolled for another month. BT
